title: Workshop prompt render autoescapes HTML-special chars in catalogue values; the agent copies the entity -> exact-match parser hard-rejects
package: prompt-workshop (render path; + production PromptTemplate.render per DEC-41)
description: render_from_substrate.py:109 (and the substrate-assembled + verify-render-parity render paths) call Django `Template(body).render(Context(...))` with autoescape ON by default. A catalogue value containing an HTML-special char (apostrophe, &, <, >, ") renders as an entity -- e.g. the division `Principal's Office (PO)` renders as `Principal's Office (PO)` (confirmed in the live render, run ...065027). The agent faithfully copies the entity-bearing token; the parser catalogue check (planner/specs.py:499 `if value in members`) exact-matches the un-escaped catalogue value -> hard reject. Surfaced at spec 6 (propose-assignments, responsible_division) once the FGAP-014 fix let the run reach a catalogue value with an apostrophe. Orthogonal to FGAP-014 (concatenation): these prompts are PLAIN TEXT, not HTML, so Django autoescape is wrong for them. Blast: any emitted catalogue value with an HTML-special char, across all specs (possessive names / apostrophes are common).

evidence.reference: :109 Template(body).render(Context(...)) -- Django autoescape on by default
:499 _check_in_catalogue exact match; F2 reject responsible_division='Principal's Office (PO)' vs catalogue 'Principal's Office (PO)'

impact: Blocks the run at any spec whose validly-chosen catalogue value contains an HTML-special char; spec 6 is the first. The DISC-26 promotion-ready draft cannot assemble until fixed.
proposed_resolution: Render the plain-text prompts with Django autoescape OFF (wrap the body in {% autoescape off %}...{% endautoescape %}, or render via a Template/Engine with autoescape=False), applied at the render call in BOTH the snippet and substrate render paths in lockstep so verify-render-parity stays 14/14 (render_from_substrate.py + the _workshop assemble + verify-render-parity renders). Reject parser entity-tolerance (DEC-40). Production PromptTemplate.render likely shares the bug (parallel; DEC-41 migration-time). The next DISC-26 iteration.
